signals.title: Rain forecast this afternoon
signals.description: Heavy rain expected from 2pm–6pm. Historically reduces dine-in and prepared foods demand by 15–20% for dinner items. Seafood and hot bar categories most affected.

signals.title: Rotisserie Chicken promo ends today
signals.description: The 2-for-$15 rotisserie chicken promotion ends at close of business today. Sales have been elevated 35–40% above baseline for the past 3 days. Expect sharp demand drop tomorrow.

signals.title: School half-day
signals.description: Lincoln Elementary and Roosevelt Middle School both have a half-day today. Students released at 11:30am. Expected spike in lunch traffic 11:30am–1:30pm. Bakery, deli, and grab-and-go categories historically see +25% lift.

signals.title: Pork shoulder delivery shortage
signals.description: Today's delivery received only 4 lbs of pork shoulder against the 5.5 lbs needed for the full production run of pulled pork sandwiches. Supplier cited processing backlog. Next delivery Thursday.
